query: I just inherited this app and have no idea how it works. Deep-dive it and map out the domains.
note: Onboard to an unknown app + deep-dive + map domains = textbook spelunking-specs.

query: Recon the codebase and write up the conventions and standards we actually follow.
note: 'Recon the codebase' + figure out conventions/standards = spelunking-specs verbatim.

query: This is a framework-heavy Drupal app — half the wiring is machine-names and hooks. Spelunk it and document how it's put together.
note: Convention/config-wired stack + 'spelunk' is exactly the spelunk-loop case.

query: Can you spec out the whole application into living docs that live next to the code?
note: Spec out the app into living repo-side specs = spelunking-specs's product.

query: Map how authentication, sessions, and OAuth fit together across the entire app.
note: Map a cross-cutting concern across the whole app into specs, not one issue.

query: We keep re-learning this legacy service every time someone touches it. Establish a spec set so the knowledge sticks.
note: Establish the repo's living spec set for a legacy app = spelunking-specs.

query: Figure out the house conventions in this repo — naming, error handling, the patterns — and where the code drifts from them.
note: Infer conventions + flag drift against the code's own pattern = spelunking-specs.

query: Refresh the specs after that big merge — re-verify the auth domain against the current code.
note: Forward-refining an existing spec set on a re-run = spelunking-specs (spec-refresh).

query: I can't understand this app by reading source — too much is wired through the DI container and config at runtime. Help me reverse-engineer the wiring.
note: Runtime/DI-wired app you can only understand by introspection = the spelunk loop.

query: Recon issue #412 and give me a level-of-effort estimate before we dispatch.
note: 'Recon' but it's one issue's HOW + LoE = technical-recon, not whole-codebase.

query: Trace this groomed ticket into the code and tell me how big the change is.
note: Reading code to size one issue = technical-recon, not mapping the app.

query: This story is vague — I can't tell what the stakeholder wants. Clarify the intent before we build.
note: Pre-dev intent clarification for one issue = grooming-issues.

query: Document the public API of our payments endpoint for the ticket I'm about to file.
note: Gathering evidence for one new issue, not establishing the repo's spec set.

query: Write me a proposal doc arguing for migrating us off the legacy auth library.
note: Co-authoring a proposal/decision doc, not auto-discovering domains into living specs.

query: Review the diff on this PR for correctness bugs.
note: PR diff review, not deep-diving the whole codebase into specs.

query: Initialize a CLAUDE.md for this repo with the build and test commands.
note: Scaffolding a CLAUDE.md is not auto-discovering domains and writing verified specs.

query: Use the Chrome devtools to debug why the login page renders blank.
note: Live debugging a page bug, not mapping the app (even though recon also drives the browser).

query: Build me a slide deck summarizing this quarter's architecture decisions.
note: Truly unrelated — slide deck creation, not codebase mapping.

query: Orchestrate the queue — keep agents going on the open issues until they're all merged.
note: Multi-agent orchestration loop, not a codebase spec deep-dive.
